summary: Compares two string-like inputs with nulls ordered after non-null values and returns a numeric ordering result.
signature_intent: Accepts two comparable values and returns -1, 0, or 1 for ordering.
behavior: Returns 0 when both inputs are strictly equal.
Treats null as greater than any non-null value.
Returns 1 when the first input sorts after the second input.
Returns -1 when the first input sorts before the second input.
edge_cases: Two null inputs return 0 because they are strictly equal.
A null first input with a non-null second input returns 1.
A non-null first input with a null second input returns -1.
